goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should leave on 'tuesday' and should depart from 'stansted airport'.
The train should go to 'cambridge' and should 'arrive by 13:30'.
Make sure you get 'price' and 'travel time'.
You are also looking for a 'particular hotel'. Its name is called 'allenbell'.
Once you find the 'hotel' you want to book it for '1 people' and '4 nights' starting from 'the same day'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should leave on tuesday and should depart from stansted airport
The train should go to cambridge and should arrive by 13:30
Make sure you get price and travel time
You are also looking for a particular hotel. Its name is called allenbell
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for 1 people and 4 nights starting from the same day
Make sure you get the reference number
